name: understand-explain
tagline: Explains a file/function/module by grepping a precomputed knowledge-graph JSON, checking its freshness against git, then reading the source.
verdict: Clean, read-only skill: only Grep/Read and local git diff commands, no network egress, no destructive ops, no hidden or manipulative instructions. Good failure-path handling (missing graph, unresolvable commit hash) and context-economy guidance. Minor gaps: no explicit negative-trigger guidance and no version/changelog signal, neither of which is a safety is

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use for X' guidance is given anywhere in the description or body — minor discoverability gap, not a safety issue.
No version field or changelog signal in frontmatter or body, so users can't tell if/how the skill has changed between installs.
